vector_explanations.character.identity.flaws_drawbacks: Every deck must include the investigator's signature weakness plus a random basic weakness - self-sabotaging cards like Paranoia or Haunted that fire when drawn.
vector_explanations.character.progression.experience_points: Victory points printed on defeated enemies and cleared locations become experience recorded in the campaign log and spent on deck upgrades between scenarios.
vector_explanations.campaign.board_campaign.branching_scenar: Campaign resolutions branch: sparing or killing key figures, failing versus succeeding, and interlude choices route the campaign through different setups and endings.
vector_explanations.campaign.board_campaign.campaign_log_she: The campaign log records resolutions, earned experience, trauma, story assets, and phrases like 'the investigators were deceived' that later scenarios reference mechanically.
vector_explanations.scoring.victory.campaign_progression_out: Scenarios rarely just end in win or lose: numbered resolutions (R1, R2, no resolution) each dictate different log entries, trauma, and starting conditions for the next scenario.
vector_explanations.campaign.continuity.replacement_characte: An investigator killed or driven insane is written out of the campaign log permanently, and the player continues the campaign with a freshly built investigator.
vector_explanations.mental.stress.trauma_conditions: Being defeated by damage or horror inflicts physical or mental trauma, permanently reducing starting health or sanity for the rest of the campaign.
vector_explanations.simulation.environment.agenda_deck: The agenda deck is the villain's clock: doom tokens accumulate each Mythos phase, and when they reach the agenda's threshold it flips, escalating the scenario regardless of player progress.
vector_explanations.narrative.structure.act_breaks: The act deck is the players' story track, advanced by spending the required clues; each act flip changes objectives, spawns story assets, and rewrites the scenario's rules.
vector_explanations.cooperation.challenge.doom_track_escalat: Doom accrues automatically and from player cards with doom costs, so even beneficial effects can accelerate the agenda - time itself is the primary antagonist.
vector_explanations.cooperation.challenge.event_deck_pressur: Each Mythos phase every investigator draws from the encounter deck - treacheries, enemies, and hazards built per scenario from themed encounter sets.
vector_explanations.simulation.investigation.clue_spending: Clues are picked up by investigating locations against their shroud values, then spent communally at the act deck to push the story forward.
vector_explanations.exploration.mapping.location_card_maps: Scenario maps are built from location cards with unrevealed and revealed sides, connected by printed connection icons that constrain movement between locations.
vector_explanations.cooperation.structure.fully_cooperative: All investigators win or lose the scenario together against the encounter and agenda decks; there is no traitor and no competitive scoring.
vector_explanations.cooperation.assistance.teammate_buff_sup: Investigators at the same location may commit cards from hand to another player's skill test, adding the matching skill icons - the game's signature cooperative act.
vector_explanations.cards.hand.multi_use_cards: Every player card can be played for its printed effect or committed to any matching skill test for its icons, so dead draws still convert into test insurance.
vector_explanations.actions.points.action_point_allowance: Each investigator takes exactly three actions per turn - move, investigate, fight, evade, draw, gain a resource, play a card, or activate an ability - budgeted against the doom clock.
vector_explanations.combat.action_economy.reactions_opportun: Taking most non-fight actions while engaged with a ready enemy provokes an attack of opportunity, making enemy management central to the action economy.
vector_explanations.stealth.detection.evade_action: The evade action tests agility against an enemy's evade value to exhaust and disengage it, letting fragile investigators slip past monsters they cannot kill.
vector_explanations.mental.sanity.sanity_meter: Horror accumulates against each investigator's sanity value; hitting the limit defeats the investigator with a mental trauma, and some cards deal horror directly to assets.
vector_explanations.combat.wounds.hit_points: Damage tracks against health with damage tokens, assignable to ally assets acting as soak; reaching zero health defeats the investigator with physical trauma.
vector_explanations.turns.phases.structured_round_phases: Rounds run Mythos (doom, agenda check, encounter draws), Investigation (players' turns), Enemy (hunters move, engaged enemies attack), and Upkeep (ready cards, draw, resources).
